overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a sunlit Mediterranean-style historic city. The character walks through narrow cobblestone alleys, descends through archways with sea views, traverses vine-covered walkways, crosses a bustling plaza with a fountain, and ascends stairs to a panoramic lakeside overlook with distant mountains.

weathered stone facade with wooden doors and small windows
small wooden crate or stall with bottles on the left side

stone archway revealing blue sea and sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cobblestone alley between tall historic stone buildings. The camera follows Geralt as he walks forward toward a distant archway that frames a view of the blue sea. A wooden crate sits on the left near an ornate stone railing, and a person sits on steps to the right.

agents.ego_description: walking down stone stairs toward the waterfront archway with sea visible ahead

bright blue sea visible through the stone archway

entrance to vine-covered walkway visible at the bottom of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends a stone staircase through a grand archway, revealing a stunning view of the blue sea beyond. The path leads toward a vine-covered entrance at the bottom of the stairs, with red flowers in planters lining the left side. The stone buildings now loom closer on either side.

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded garden path covered in vines and leaves

entered.detail: stone fountain visible at the end of the walkway in the plaza
distinctive building with green copper roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shaded, vine-covered pergola with dense greenery overhead, creating dappled light patterns on the stone path. At the end of the walkway, a bright open plaza with a central fountain and a distinctive green-roofed building becomes visible as the character emerges from the covered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town plaza with central fountain and surrounding historic buildings

events.description: turns right to circle around the central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the plaza fountain past other pedestrians and townspeople

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress standing near the fountain

entered.detail: three-story orange stucco building with arched windows and balconies
flower beds with bright red roses lining the plaza edge
wide stone staircase leading upward on the far side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges into a bright, open town plaza paved with cobblestones and centered around a stone fountain. The character turns right to circle the fountain, passing pedestrians including a woman in a green dress and a running child. Historic buildings with orange stucco and green roofs surround the square, and a grand staircase leads upward on the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone staircase with panoramic lake and mountain views

events.description: begins ascending stairs with expansive lake and mountain view opening up

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs while overlooking the expansive lake and distant mountains

notable_agents.action: man in blue shirt ascending stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: expansive blue lake visible in the valley below with mountains beyond
hazy mountain range forming the backdrop across the lake
ancient stone archway ruins with red and white columns

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a wide stone staircase where the view opens up to reveal a breathtaking panorama of a large blue lake surrounded by distant mountains. Ancient ruined archways with columns line the left side of the stairs. Other pedestrians climb ahead as the elevation increases and the cityscape below becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic overlook with distant castle and lake views

agents.ego_description: continuing up stairs with panoramic views of the lake and distant castle town

entered.detail: castle or large town visible across the lake on the distant shore
tall green cypress trees lining the right side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues the ascent along the elevated stone staircase, offering expansive panoramic views of the lake, distant mountains, and a castle town visible across the water. Tall cypress trees line the path as the character climbs higher, with the grand vista dominating the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate confines of a narrow historic alleyway to a sweeping panoramic overlook of a lakeside landscape. It begins by following Geralt through a cobblestone passage toward a distant archway, moving past a wooden crate and a seated figure before descending a stone staircase that reveals the blue sea. As the character passes through a shaded, vine-covered pergola with dappled light, the scene opens into a bright, bustling town plaza centered around a stone fountain and surrounded by orange stucco buildings. The camera then follows Geralt as he turns away from the square to ascend a wide stone staircase lined with ancient ruined columns. Finally, the elevation increases past tall cypress trees, shifting the perspective from the urban cityscape to an expansive vista of a large blue lake, distant mountains, and a castle town across the water.
